change_comments.message:
Hi, nice to see work being done already.
1 - missing copyright headers in all java files.
2 - you are introducing 15 issues according to sonar. Please have them fixed. https://sonarcloud.io/project/issues?issueStatuses=OPEN%2CCONFIRMED&sinceLeakPeriod=true&branch=138946-1&id=onap_policy-xacml-pdp
3 - have you tested this code changes against CSIT?

Hi, I have made changes as per suggested in sonar qube and also added copyright to all modified java classes.
I did not tested code against CSIT.
Please check latest commit with given link (I have changed change-id while committing because it not able to push changes with same change-id)
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/policy/xacml-pdp/+/138949/1

did you use the "git commit --amend" when fixing the issues? Because then we would have to merge first the review that is incorrect to be able to merge the other one. Or maybe create a new one with all the changes in one place from zero.
Hi, I have used git commit -- amend. but after in second relation chain, I am able to commit all changes in single relation.

maybe you can do a squash https://www.git-tower.com/learn/git/faq/git-squash/
and use the last changeId, as you were able to push patches to it. I'd rather not have relation chains to be pushed.
Git squash may become messy at end, So instead of this I will consider your first suggestion to create new one with changes in one place from zero, Now I am abandoning current commit.

inline_comments.message:
Modifications copyrights need to be added.
Under this line, should be something like
Modifications Copyright (C) 2024 your-company-name.
Add this to every java class.
